description_long: This pedestrian adult is dressed in a long, fur-collared coat with a belted waist and layered, rugged clothing, evoking a historical or fantasy-inspired urban look. The figure wears a large, wide-brimmed tricorn hat adorned with a metallic button and has visible facial markings or a mask, adding to a mysterious appearance. Both arms are equipped with armored bracers and mechanical elements, suggesting a blend of traditional and steampunk aesthetics. The person is wearing fitted pants and open-toed sandals, which contrast with the otherwise heavy attire. Accessories such as pouches and straps are attached to the belt and coat, indicating utility and readiness for urban exploration. The overall build is robust, with a confident, upright stance and detailed textures on the clothing and accessories.
description: A robust adult in a long, fur-collared coat, tricorn hat, armored bracers, and open-toed sandals, blending historical and steampunk styles with utility accessories.
description_view_0: Front view shows the tricorn hat, fur-collared coat, facial markings or mask, armored bracers, and utility belt with pouches.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the hat, the layered coat, mechanical arm details, and the open-toed sandals.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the coat, belt with pouches, and the full length of the coat and pants.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the mechanical arm features, coat layers, and the side profile of the hat and footwear.
attribute_clothing_type: long fur-collared coat with belted waist, armored bracers, layered urban garments, and a tricorn hat
